name: First Cash Pawn
description_short: Bedford, TX's First Cash Pawn at 1315 Brown Trail offers quick cash for jewelry, electronics, tools, and collectibles.
description_long:
Located at 1315 Brown Trail in Bedford, TX, First Cash Pawn operates as a standalone pawn shop serving the local community. The store is open Monday through Saturday from 10AM to 7PM, and Sunday from 12PM to 6PM, making it accessible for both weekday and weekend customers in Bedford. This convenient location provides quick access to pawn services for residents throughout the Bedford area.

The shop specializes in fair-value pawns and sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, sporting equipment, and collectibles. Expert staff evaluate items quickly and offer competitive rates. To inquire about specific items, get an estimate, or check current inventory, contact the Bedford location at +1 817-282-8057.

Bring a valid government-issued ID and your items—the team handles transactions promptly with transparent terms. Local residents value this Bedford pawn shop for emergency cash needs and quality secondhand finds at competitive prices.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., UK, and Latin America ensure convenient access for most consumers
Listed on S&P MidCap 400 and Russell 2000 indices, signaling financial stability and institutional credibility
Non-recourse pawn loans mean no credit check required and no personal liability beyond loss of collateral
Buys and sells wide variety of items (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Offers layaway services with affordable 10% down payment for customers who want alternative purchasing options
Gold and precious metals buying program provides immediate cash for items most people have at home
Fast funding—same-day or next-day cash on pawn loans with no underwriting delays
cons: Pawn loans carry higher effective interest rates and fees compared to personal loans or credit alternatives
Non-recourse nature means items are permanently lost if redemption deadline is missed—no grace periods implied
Limited to collateral-based lending; customers must own valuable physical items to qualify for loans
Retail merchandise quality and selection varies by location; no guarantee of finding desired items
Website does not disclose specific loan terms, APR ranges, fees, or redemption periods, making comparison difficult
best_for: Consumers with immediate cash needs ($100-$5,000+) who own valuable items and lack access to traditional credit
Individuals seeking to sell gold, jewelry, or electronics quickly for cash without haggling at multiple locations
Credit-constrained or unbanked consumers who need fast funding without credit checks or income verification
Budget-conscious shoppers interested in layaway plans as an alternative to credit cards or financing
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for cash-constrained consumers with valuable possessions who need immediate funds and cannot access traditional credit products. The main caveat is that pawn lending, while fast and accessible, is substantially more expensive than personal loans or payday alternatives—redemption deadlines are firm, and failure to repay results in permanent loss of collateral rather than debt or credit impact.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, sporting goods, musical instruments)
Gold, silver, and platinum buying with immediate cash payment
Retail merchandise sales of pawned and purchased items
Layaway services with 10% down payment option
Lease-to-own and retail finance payment solutions (through subsidiary AFF at 15,000+ merchant partner locations)
Online store locator to find nearest FirstCash location
Consumer FAQs and educational resources on pawn loans
Buy services for items of value at retail locations
meta_description: First Cash Pawn at 1315 Brown Trail, Bedford, TX. Quick cash for jewelry, electronics, tools, and more.
